subject: [PATCH v2 2/4] sunrpc: use per-net counts in svc_seq_show()

2026-05-25.patch_summary: This patch updates the svc_seq_show() function to read procedure call counts from per-network-namespace arrays instead of global ones. This change allows /proc/net/rpc/nfsd to report procedure call counts for each network namespace separately. The patch only affects nfsd, which always allocates these counts via a specific initialization function.
